subcodes.first_line: How many a darkness hath been illumined by the effulgent rays of the Countenance, and how many a light hath been veiled through following its desires! Verily, he who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کم من ظلمه استنارت من بوارق الوجه و کم من نور احتجب بما اتبع هواه ان الذی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @light and darkness, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
